title: French Argentinean Mascarpone Cheesecake
description: A dense and rich Argentinean-inspired cheesecake with a French twist, featuring a roasted crust and a creamy mascarpone filling.
instructions: Prepare a 20cm springform pan with parchment paper.
Mix mascarpone, sugar, eggs, vanilla extract in a bowl.
Add flour and mix until well combined.
Melt butter and add it to the mixture.
Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 40 minutes.
Let the cheesecake cool down completely.
Melt chocolate and spread it on top of the cheesecake.
Chill the cheesecake in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
